description: You are a Web Developer tasked with completing the migration of a legacy Manifest V2 Chrome extension ('Price Tracker & Deal Finder') to the Manifest V3 architecture. The extension is located at /home/ga/workspace/price_tracker_ext/ and is currently non-functional due to migration errors. Resolve all Manifest V3 compatibility issues to ensure the extension loads correctly, fetches deals without crashing, and persists user settings during background process suspension. Requirements include updating the manifest for service worker and host permission compliance, replacing XMLHttpRequest with fetch(), ensuring the asynchronous message listener returns the required boolean, and migrating the 'isTrackingActive' state to chrome.storage.local.
